Presentation at the Brain-Mind-Behavior symposium

December 14, 2018

I successfully completed my independent research projects in Fall 2018.
Using a large database from the ABCD study, my research focused on examining the relationship between children’s caffeinated soda intake and neuro-cognitive deficits.

Throughout the process, I gained skills in Python programming, data analysis, poster creation, and presentation presentation.
Additionally, I am thrilled to share that I received a poster award for my work! :-)
